inputs.label: Number of Drywall Sheets
inputs.businessContext: Total number of drywall sheets to be taped and finished.

inputs.label: Average Joint Length per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Average linear length of joints per sheet (including butt and tapered joints).

inputs.label: Joint Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the joint compound application area across the joint.

inputs.label: Compound Thickness per Coat
inputs.businessContext: Applied wet thickness of joint compound per coat.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of coats applied (e.g., tape coat, fill coat, finish coat).

inputs.label: Coverage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer-specified coverage rate per mm thickness per kg of compound.
